reviews.review_msg: ENGLISH 108: Karen is very kind and cares about her students. She is ridiculously fast at answering emails. I would not take her in person though, the only way I could get through the lectures was at 2X speed. She is a very slow talker. She is a bit tougher as a grader, but if you put the work in, you will do well. Very fast marker.

Kind've a scattered prof and always came into class out of breath for some reason. Lectures were unorganized which made it tough for myself as well as others to take a worthwhile note through the first 6 weeks of class.
Kind of a hard marker, but overall, quite enjoyed her class. She tries to make things interesting. Very easygoing prof.
Karen was a great prof. She has really interesting lectures and she was a great speaker. She seemed fairly easy at marking, and was really helpful in tutorials when you asked her for help.
just terrible...i will never take a english course again because of the horrible experience I had with her class.
Great instructor and a role model for powerful women everywhere. Really helped in putting a feminist perspective into the literature. Just great.
she is a hard marker,and some of the novels were so unbelievably boring.

I agree with most assessments of Karen here.She is quite boastful in class of being a hardline feminist.I give her credit for her honesty,but I really do not feel comfortable with her rigid manner of thinking.

really interesting course, i would reccomend it to anyone.  as for karen, brings up some very interesting arguments, however, the power point notes do nothing, so LISTEN! seems to get distracted easily, which seems cute at first but gets annoying in the end.  the course content made the class for me, rather than the prof.
